afterContent.description:
Content rendered inside the bubble after the message parts.
Useful for placing inline metadata (e.g. timestamp, status) inside the bubble.

partProps.description: Props forwarded to the built-in unstyled part renderer components. Use this to pass slots and slotProps to individual part type renderers.

part.name: part
part.description: The message part to resolve a renderer for.

localeText.name: localeText
localeText.description: The locale text for the chat.
